    @allure.story("输入全部数据，添加保存成功")
    def test_resource_addall(self, config):
        name = '1测试数据C'
        self.item.click_toolbar_button('新增')
        self.item.fill_inputs_by_form(self.all_input_text, name)
        self.item.fill_inputs_by_form(self.num_list, '11')
        self.item.fill_click_select_form(self.select_list)
        self.item.fill_click_box_form(self.box_list)
        self.item.fill_click_codebox_form(self.codebox_list)
        self.item.fill_click_date_form(self.time_list)
    
        all_value = self.all_input_text + self.num_list + self.select_list + self.box_list + self.codebox_list + self.time_list
        len_num = len(all_value)
        before_text = self.item.batch_get_input_values(all_value)
    
        self.item.click_table_confirm_button('确定')
        self.item.right_refresh('资源')
        num = self.item.go_settings()
        print(num)
        self.item.click_layout_confirm_button('取消')
        self.item.fill_column_filter("资源代码", name)
        self.item.click_visible_table_row_by_column_value(2, name)
        self.item.click_toolbar_button('编辑')
        after_text = self.item.batch_get_input_values(all_value)
        user = self.item.batch_get_input_values(['更新者', '更新时间'])
        today_str = date.today().strftime('%Y/%m/%d')
        logging.info(
            "before_all_value=%s, user=%s, today_str=%s",
            before_text,
            user,
            today_str
        )
        self.item.click_table_confirm_button('取消')
